sentence: Even the brat knows when the cunninlinguist has nothing left to say.

wombos.definition: Someone masterfully skilled at putting words together — a cunning, precision-level wombo deployer. The highest tier of bangpoundulary. 'That cunninlinguist will deliver the quiche peanemis with no analvisions.'
A cat that has bonded to a bro — a feline who has accepted bro-coded ownership and behaves accordingly. Often named something like Tank.
wombos.example: His brat watches every game with him from the arm of the couch.
